text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen to pass by the outdoor stage after
training, when...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Thanks for droppin' by today, Grass and Spe!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to thank us. So, what's the
occasion?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: You said you had something to show us?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... Why, I'm glad you asked!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I could give you the answer, but a true entertainer
communicates on the stage! Now, feast your eyes
on this special performance!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Uh... El?! Where did she—

text_block_list.name: Mambo
text_block_list.text: CAAAAAWWWWW!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Why is a bird here?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Well, wouldn't you know? It's El's pet hawk,
Mambo.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: A h-hawk?! I heard that El had a pet condor...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Grass! Spe! You shouldn't let your guards down!
For now, I am over HEEEEERE!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa! The show's started?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Uno! For your appetizer, we're tossing up our
favorite judo throws! So fresh and fantastic!

text_block_list.name: Mambo
text_block_list.text: Caw! ♪ Caaaaawww! ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Gosh, this does seem awfully fun.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Dos! Grilled fish is off the menu today! Instead,
enjoy a piledriver that's so well done it's sizzlin'!

text_block_list.name: Mambo
text_block_list.text: Caw! CAAAAAWWW!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: M-Mambo's getting fired up?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Tres! For the main dish, it's a show-stopping
tornillo! Mash 'em, grate 'em, and stick 'em in a
stew!

text_block_list.name: Mambo
text_block_list.text: Caw! Ca-caw! ♪ Caaaaawww! ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
My goodness, this is very exciting. It's just like a
circus! ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Maravilloso! Now that our full-course menu is
complete, it's time for everyone to join in!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All together now! Who's the world's greatest
Phantom Bird?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Is this perhaps a call-and-response performance?
In that case...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no! Put some bass in your voices—shout it
out loud! Who's the world's greatest Phantom
Bird?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder and Special Week
text_block_list.text: E-El Condor... Pasa?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No, no! Your voices gotta match my passion!
Who's the world's greatest Phantom Bird?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder and Special Week
text_block_list.text: EL CONDOR PASAAAAA!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sí! I am numero uno! The greatest luchadora
around—El Condor Pasa!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder and Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That performance got me heated up! I'm all
sweaty now!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, it was a wonderful performance. You truly
connected with your audience.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Gracias, both of you! I've finally found a
performance that's unique to me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm bringing in the lucha spirit, just how my papi
taught me! Right, Mambo?

text_block_list.name: Mambo
text_block_list.text: CAAAAAWWWWW! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hm? What are you all doing at this hour—is that a bird?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Gah! It'll be curtains for me if she finds out that
Mambo's my pet! Everyone, run!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaat?! I can't just spring into action just like
that!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh wow, El had my undivided attention. But it
would be wise to make our escape now.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Waaaargh?! Wait, El! Graaaaass!
